name: Scorpio Gold Corporation
description: Scorpio Gold Corporation is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on unlocking gold potential in Nevada, USA. The company holds a 100% interest in the Manhattan District, located in the prolific Walker Lane Trend. With a strategic focus on high-grade gold, Scorpio Gold is actively engaged in exploration and development activities, including a significant drill program. The company is committed to advancing its newly consolidated district-scale assets, which feature multi-million-ounce potential, while maintaining a strong financial position to support its ongoing operational and exploration objectives in the region.
